title: Add BuildArg key to quadlets
body:
This addresses #27065, adding a `BuildArg` key to quadlet `.build` files. I believe I correctly integrated this into existing tests with [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/compare/main...givensuman:podman:T-27065-add-quadlet-build-args-support?expand=1#diff-6d61a9bb91ee257b946440805aff25ac4dd1a10efd492223924fb4efb280e567) file.

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

<!--
If no, just write `None` in the release-note block below. If yes, a release note
is required: Enter your extended release note in the block below. If the PR
requires additional action from users switching to the new release, include the
string "action required".

For more information on release notes, please follow the Kubernetes model:
https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/release-notes.md
-->

```release-note
Add BuildArg key to quadlet `.build` files which equates to `podman build --build-arg` flag.
```
